title: The Crew Searches for the True Enemy
description: On pages 21–24, this part focuses on the crew searches for the true enemy, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Searches for the True Enemy. Alubarna becomes the battlefield where Koza, Cobra’s army, and Crocodile’s manipulation finally meet. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No matter how long you keep up with these annoying attacks like an insignificant mosquito, you'll never-

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I told you it was futile...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: No matter how hard you struggle,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: A rubber human like you will never, ever,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What the hell have you been tryin' to say!?

summary: This part develops the crew searches for the true enemy and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
